_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: None or very faint merlin expression were found in nearly all of the 'two-hits' tumours...Distinct merlin levels were observed in 18 (60%) out of 30 'one-hit' tumours
details: Successfully detected merlin expression differences between tumor types: none/very faint in two-hits tumors, distinct levels in 60% of one-hit tumors
